comment.body:
don't overcomplicate it.
written in the "reversion scripts" post: probabilities... the levels give you the probabilities assigned to certain levels assuming gaussian distribution.
probabilities of having the spot in the marked range... so the probability of having out is 100-x%
implication: the higher the market climbs, the higher the reversion probability grows
